---
title: "Practical Work in Sunday Schools. By Miss Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”."
---

## Practical Work in Sunday Schools. By Miss Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881
**Genre:** Non-fiction, theology, advice to church workers
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
